title: microphysca quadrialata
intro: Microphysca quadrialata, commonly known as the Four-angled Moss, is a species of liverwort that belongs to the genus Microphysca. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate the immune system and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Microphysca quadrialata include its potential to treat various conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a diuretic to aid in fluid removal from the body. Herbal preparations of Microphysca quadrialata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
